title: Schema Registry EB Roadmap Cleanup
description: Batch of schema fixes discovered during Ectropy Business roadmap validation: roadmap v3.4 $schema const correction, pitch.problem oneOf regression fix, enum additions (compute, tech-stack, testingTool, architecturePattern), and venture-summary deprecation. All PRs merged 2026-05-30. Cleared the schema validation debt blocking EB roadmap CI.

outputs.description: roadmap.schema.v3.4.json $schema const corrected (was v3.3, should be v3.4) — PR #39.
pitch.problem oneOf regression restored to v3.4 shape — PR #40.
acceptanceCriteria: pitch.problem field validates correctly in v3.4 schema

outputs.description: Enum additions: compute to sharedResourceType (#42), tech-stack values (#43), testingTool component (#44), architecturePattern api-gateway/speckle-integration/bim (#45).
acceptanceCriteria: All four enum expansions land in their respective schema files
EB roadmap validates against updated schemas

outputs.description: venture-summary deprecated: removed from registry, archived at schemas/_archive/ — PR #47.
acceptanceCriteria: Consumers (dashboard-sync, dataroom-sync) on migration path per FU-VENTURE-SUMMARY-DOWNSTREAM-MIGRATION-1

postMerge: EB roadmap validates against corrected schemas

transitions.trigger: Schema drift identified during EB roadmap validation; batch fix dispatched
Individual fix branches created (fix/roadmap-v3.4-schema-const-2026-05-29, fix/tech-stack-enum-additions-2026-05-29, etc.)
Final PR (#47 venture-summary deprecation) merged; all batch fixes landed
Post-merge: EB roadmap CI green; schema-refs reflects deprecation

notes: Multi-PR deliverable spanning branches: fix/roadmap-v3.4-schema-const-2026-05-29 (#39, b5d692ac), fix/roadmap-v3.4-pitch-problem-regression-2026-05-29 (#40, cbdd953d), fix/shared-resource-type-enum-compute-2026-05-29 (#42, 6365cf69), fix/tech-stack-enum-additions-2026-05-29 (#43, 328dee97), fix/testing-type-enum-component-2026-05-29 (#44, 7d9530b2), fix/arch-pattern-enum-additions-2026-05-29 (#45, 29ab76c4), chore/deprecate-venture-summary-2026-05-30 (#47, 0f4428f2). scope.branch reflects the terminal PR branch. S6-staged omitted from transitions — multi-PR arc had no single staging event; PRs merged individually.
